title: api-key-minter Helm values
description: Configuration schema for the `api-key-minter` service. Generated from packages/common/src/config/schema.ts — do not edit by hand. Regenerate with `npm run gen:helm-schema` from the repository root.

env.description: Environment variables injected into the service container. Keys map 1-to-1 to the environment variables consumed by the service.

NODE_ENV.description: Deployment environment. Used by logging and CORS to pick safe defaults.

MINTER_PORT.description: TCP port the api-key-minter HTTP server binds to. Default: 3004.

MINTER_ISSUER_DID.description: DID of the minter's capability issuer. Embedded in minted tokens as the `iss` claim. Default: did:web:minter.eunox.local.

MINTER_GATEWAY_AUDIENCE.description: Expected `aud` claim on incoming capability tokens that authorize minting. Default: tool-gateway.

MINTER_TOKEN_TTL_SECONDS.description: Default TTL (seconds) for minted API key tokens. Default: 3600.

MINTER_ADMIN_API_KEY.description: Static admin API key for /admin/* routes. Required in production. Must be at least 32 characters.

MINTER_ADMIN_JWKS_URI.description: JWKS endpoint for operator JWT verification on admin routes. When set alongside MINTER_ADMIN_JWT_AUDIENCE, operator JWTs are accepted in addition to the static admin key.

MINTER_ADMIN_JWT_AUDIENCE.description: Expected `aud` claim in admin JWTs. Required alongside MINTER_ADMIN_JWKS_URI.

MINTER_ADMIN_JWT_ISSUER.description: Expected `iss` claim in admin JWTs. Optional additional check; requires MINTER_ADMIN_JWKS_URI and MINTER_ADMIN_JWT_AUDIENCE to be set.

MINTER_PEPPER_HEX.description: 64-character hex string (32 bytes / 256-bit pepper) used to hash API keys at rest. Required in production. Rotate via key-rotation API.

MINTER_PEPPER_VERSION.description: Symbolic version label for MINTER_PEPPER_HEX (e.g. "v1", "v2"). Default: v1.

MINTER_RATE_LIMIT_MAX.description: Maximum minting requests per window per subject. Default: 10.

MINTER_KMS_PROVIDER.description: KMS provider for HSM-backed API key signing. When set, MINTER_PRIVATE_KEY_PEM / MINTER_PUBLIC_KEY_PEM are ignored. Recommended for production.

MINTER_PRIVATE_KEY_PEM.description: PEM-encoded private key for software signing. Required alongside MINTER_PUBLIC_KEY_PEM when MINTER_KMS_PROVIDER is unset. In production prefer MINTER_KMS_PROVIDER for HSM-backed non-exportable keys.

MINTER_PUBLIC_KEY_PEM.description: PEM-encoded public key matching MINTER_PRIVATE_KEY_PEM. Required alongside MINTER_PRIVATE_KEY_PEM.

MINTER_SIGNING_ALGORITHM.description: JWS algorithm for minted tokens. Default: ES256. Must match the key type supplied via PEM or KMS.

MINTER_AUDIT_DB_URL.description: Postgres connection URL for the append-only mint audit store. When set, mint events are durably persisted. Required in production.

MINTER_AUDIT_SCHEMA_INIT.description: Set to "true" to run DDL migrations for the mint audit table at startup. Safe to leave true across restarts.

MINTER_API_KEY_DB_URL.description: Postgres connection URL for the API key store. When set, minted API keys survive restarts. Required in production.

MINTER_API_KEY_SCHEMA_INIT.description: Set to "true" to run DDL migrations for the API key table at startup.

MINTER_AUDIT_POOL_SIZE.description: Postgres connection pool size for the audit store. Default: 5.

MINTER_API_KEY_POOL_SIZE.description: Postgres connection pool size for the API key store. Default: 5.

MINTER_PG_CONNECTION_TIMEOUT_MS.description: Postgres connection timeout in milliseconds. Default: 5000.
